title: verbascum inulifolium
intro: Verbascum inulifolium, also known as Mullein with Inulin, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the figwort family and is native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum inulifolium include reducing inflammation, improving sleep, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Verbascum inulifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal products or added to skincare products for its moisturizing and antioxidant properties.
